summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of DrawingPackagePage portfolio at 1440x900 viewport. All major features verified via Playwright screenshots and DOM assertions.

issues: Station A image (torque-wrench-03.webp) displays what appears to be an exploded AR assembly diagram rather than a torque wrench — verify this is the intended image

critical_code_review_comments: ProjectZone.tsx: IntersectionObserver in useLayoutEffect won't detect CSS-transformed elements (correct — active prop path bypasses this, but the observer path is dead code for this use-case)
DrawingPackagePage.tsx line 167: heroTextRef starts at opacity:0, autoplay fires via gsap.to. If user's system has reduced-motion preference, GSAP still runs (no prefers-reduced-motion check)

Station progress indicator: label text uses 'transparent' color (not opacity 0) so it renders but is invisible — this is fine for the current design but 'transparent' color transition may have no visual effect; opacity transition handles it correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested at http://127.0.0.1:5174/Mark_Hintz-Portfolio-v2/drawing-package. All scroll stations (A=800, B=2200, C=3500, D=4900, T=6500) fire correctly. All data-testid attributes present. Hero auto-animates. Scroll-hint appears/disappears correctly. Title block shows correct content.

test_results.hero_text_visible_on_load: PASS — MARK HINTZ fully rendered at 1440x900
test_results.hero_auto_animate: PASS — opacity transitions from 0 to 1 without scroll (delay 0.35s, duration 0.95s)
test_results.scroll_hint_visible: PASS — data-testid=scroll-hint opacity=1 in hero zone
test_results.station_a_fires: PASS — camera pans to trigger guard area, circle shows TRIGGER GUARD RADIUS label, station indicator shows TRIGGER GUARD — A
test_results.station_b_fires: PASS — camera moves to buffer tube area, BUFFER TUBE SOCKET label shown, indicator BUFFER TUBE — B
test_results.station_c_fires: PASS — pump package with INDUSTRIAL DEWATERING PUMP label, indicator PUMP PACKAGE — C
test_results.title_block_fires: PASS — DESIGN + MANUFACTURING BRIDGE, M. HINTZ, revision history A/B/C, AVAILABLE FOR WORK
test_results.scroll_back_to_hero: PASS — scroll-hint returns to opacity=1 on scroll back to 0
test_results.station_progress_indicator: PASS — all 5 boxes (A/B/C/D/T) visible, active station highlighted with label sliding in
test_results.data_testid_station_dots: PASS — station-dot-A through station-dot-T all present
